documentation.description:
Contains the routine for computing the image  of signed and unsigned
integers up to Integer for use by ``Ada.Text_IO.Integer_IO`` and
``Ada.Text_IO.Modular_IO``.

subprograms.name: Set_Image_Width_Integer
Set_Image_Width_Unsigned

generic_instantiations.name: Impl
generic_instantiations.code: package Impl is new Image_W (Integer, Unsigned);
